name: Typewriter Letter
description: Vintage typewriter paper with warm tones and letter-style spacing.

preview.sampleText: A retro letter layout for personal notes and memos.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-[#2f241d] uppercase tracking-[0.08em]
classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide text-[#5a4638]
classes.th: border border-[#c7b39b] p-2 bg-[#efe3cd] text-left font-semibold text-[#2f241d]
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-[#b38867] pl-4 my-5 italic text-[#4a392c] bg-[#f7efdf] py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-[#e7dcc9] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-[#2f241d]
classes.pre: bg-[#efe3cd] p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-[#c7b39b]
